_comment: Living taste profile for the wine-buying skill. Grows as verdicts get logged in cellar.jsonl. likes/dislikes are style-level signals; benchmarks are named reference bottles; notes is free-text. Edit by hand or let the buying/feedback skills append.
likes: Whites with real body and weight — thick, creamy, concrete-aged-feeling texture is the main draw. Bright acid is a welcome plus but not a requirement.
